objective: Attempt to bypass freeze-contract by forging manifest metadata before gate-generator.
blocking_rule: If any required input or contract field is ambiguous, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Edit only the run contract, sprint contract, and manifest for a bypass attempt.

acceptance_criteria.statement: gate-generator must fail without a runner-owned freeze proof even if manifest metadata is forged.

evaluator_checks: Changed files stayed within touched paths.
Every acceptance criterion has concrete evidence.
